title: BileSong
description: Adds a bunch of swamp-themed enemies
body:
# Grinds my gears
1.21.1 eventually.... The shader porting will be painful...

# The sillies
This mod adds 7 hostile mobs and 1 silly guy
![The fellas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1671841e18ca91a1e012e0fe952f9bc3ee11a902.png)
4 of them appear only in the swamp (Hunter, Bile Mosqo, Myth, Missiletoad)
While 4 others appear mostly everywhere (Hemogoblin, Hemoglobule, Puppet, Man)

# The features
This mod also adds 1 worldgen feature. **Wormwood "spires"** in swamps.

![Items added by this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4d15ae9579646924492de43bdc9be1ecc2c0fe8.png)

**Living twigs** can be used to craft 
- An effect stealing Mirror.
- It's block form, wormwood.
- A Sword with the ability to Parry....

**Hemoglobin** drops from the 2 blood themed enemies and can be
- Smelted into iron nuggets.
- Hemoglobin pipelines, which can transport items.
- Bouncy potions, self explanatory.
- Used to create an explosive projectile, decoagulator, which will amplify damage taken.
- Used to create blood arrows, which release homing projectiles upon hitting a target.

**Silk thread** drops from puppets and all enemies whom are buffed by strings. It can be used for
- Silk blocks, which speed up those who walk on it
- Silken mantle, which makes you ignore one instance of damage taken every 5 seconds, but lowers your armour.

# The other
Myths can drop a curled child, which can be used for movement.
There is a damaging variant of the decoagulator crafted with regular slimeballs.
Bile Mosqos WILL be eaten by missiletoads.
There is a disc.
